DyslexaRead
Open App →

AI-powered handwriting analysis

Reading every
hand that
writes.

DyslexaRead uses Google Gemini AI to transcribe, analyze, and correct dyslexic and dysgraphic handwriting — free, fast, and built with empathy for every learner.

Get Started See how it works
Live Analysis
Patterns Detected
b/d reversal letter transposition phonetic spelling word omission inconsistent spacing
Corrected Text

"The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog near the old oak tree."

Powered by Gemini 2.5 Flash
100% Free
Google AI Studio free tier — no credit card
5–15s
Average analysis time per image
2-Step AI
Transcribe first, then analyze errors

The process

Three steps to clarity.

01
📷

Capture or Upload

Take a photo with your camera or upload an image of any handwritten text — worksheets, notes, homework, letters.

02
🧠

AI Transcription

Gemini 2.5 Flash reads the handwriting exactly as written — every reversal, substitution, and omission preserved faithfully.

03
✨

Error Analysis

Patterns are categorized by type — b/d reversals, transpositions, phonetic errors — and a corrected version is produced.

Features

Everything an educator needs.

📹

Live Camera Mode

Stream your webcam and auto-capture every 5 seconds for continuous, hands-free classroom analysis.

📊

Tabbed Results

Raw transcription, detailed error analysis, and corrected text — all neatly separated in three tabs.

🔑

Bring Your Own Key

Paste your Gemini API key once — it stays in your browser. Or let the server backend handle it silently.

💾

Save Results

Download full analysis reports as text files for records, IEPs, or sharing with specialists and parents.

⚡

Streaming Output

Watch the AI's analysis appear word-by-word in real time — no waiting for a full response before reading.

🆓

Completely Free

Built on Google AI Studio's free tier. No subscriptions, no local GPU, no hidden costs — ever.

Ready?

Start reading every
hand that writes.

Free to use, no sign-up required. Just open the app, upload a handwriting sample, and get results in seconds.

Open DyslexaRead
DyslexaRead

Built with Google Gemini AI · Free & open source
